titleStmt.title: SII 27.195: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 195. (A.R. No. 608 of 1929-30.) GUṆḌIMI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up by the prākāra of Māṇi-Chennakēśava temple.
This badly damaged record is dated Kali 46[60], Śaka 1481, Siddhārthi, Māgha śu. 1 corresponding to 1560 A.D., January 27. The details of date are not verifiable.

It registers gifts of land to a deity at Guṇḍume, a locality belonging to the village Kōṭa, by the five stānikas, for worship, offerings and burning a perpetual lamp on festive occasions. It refers to Bārakūra-sīme and to Sadāśivarāya-nāyaka. The details are all lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . namastuṁga śiracuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravēttu . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavētu . śrī svastiśrī jayābhyudaya kaliyuga 4660 saṁ(ṁ)du śālivāhana śaka 1481 neya siddhārtthi
saṁvatsara māgha śu 1 lu śrīmaṁnmahā rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāśivarāya mahārā
yaru vejeyanagariya paṭaṇadalu sukhasaṁkhathāvinōdadiṁ sāmrājyavanāḷuta yihakāladalu śrīsadāśiva
dēvamahārāyaru bārakūra sīme dalu rāyanū yāge pālisalāgi Ā bhayagaḷu koṭṭa grāmada
gōpana bhayagaḷige pālisalāgi Ā bhayagaḷukoṭṭa grāmada
kāladalū yi kōṭa grāmake saluva nakesaluva guṁḍume
mūḷige voppava stānikarayivaru voppi barasida dēvasvada taḷada vivara . Amrutapaḍige tōḍiṁ
haravarigamuṁ śivakārtaṁgate gadde mu 5 Accaṁgereya gade hā 15 U grāṇi voḷa mā
pura kāraṁtara hunihoḷara yikkarara gauḷiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva Oṇiyiṁ baḍaga badara sāvada niṁda
ṁ mūḍa tōḍiṁdaṁ teṁka ha 23 mane Ādi hā 40 gere bāyalu kereyiṁdaṁ baḍaga mūḍalu padaniṁ teṁka
Ayidaḷiṁ paḍuva gade mu 2 hitilagade Ōṇiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa Ōṇiyiṁdaṁ teṁkagade mu 1 teṁka makki
niṁ paḍuva panimāṇi moḷadiṁ mu gade mu 3 na 1 kke hā 5 Akki vritti
Ōṇiyiṁ teṁka Aṁṇamahoḷaniṁdaṁ baḍaga mu 1 Aṁṇa hoḷaniṁ teṁmu 1 hā 10 hosa maṭa
niṁmū bastiyiṁ paḍa mu 1 keyiṁ tōḍiṁ nigere taṁnērahoḷa mu 8120
kruṣṇalōkaniṁ teṁka kesauraḷiriṁ muḍa mu 1 baḍa mākaṇa seṭa teṁka
damaged
kuṁbaṭaniṁ muḍa kruṣṇa baṭaniṁ paḍaharigōviṁda
paḍuva kruṣṇatuṁganiṁ mūḍa mu 55
damaged
hoḷabeṭu . Aṇanaramane teṁka Aṁṇa maniṁ muḍamane ha 10
18 naḍukaṁḍi mu 45 hā 28 kaṁ kālake giṇi muḍe 200
śrī gaṁdake mu 44 ṇi karige mu 1 Ā
veṭṭakke mu 1 vaḷivecca mu 2 Upākarma mu 1 Amāsi dvādaśi mu 12 ka mūḍe gade
ṁdalu naṁdādīvige mu 9 mu
12 lu varu 1 ka Akimu 120 mariyādeya Ācaṁdrārkka naḍava
dīvige Eṇe ha 1 . kāgi māṇi hoḷara mulakaḷi bayalu nārāṇa hoḷaniṁ muḍalaṁ
kaho 13 gade mere davasegeyi barada dāḍe hoḷa niṁda bicoroḍi
taḍu Aṇakāraṁta muḍa hā 10 gade meleya sege yiIbara dharma Uḍige nāvadagiṁ dharma
kereyi baḍahā 10 gade mele Amavasege nālara dharma naḍavadu
sadāśivarāya nāyakara kāladalu kale Ayivaru stanikaru Opi māḍida dha
rma yi dharmakke Aḷupidare vāraṇāsiyali sāvirada Ayinūru kavilegōva koṁda pāpake hō
guvaru keḍivoṁda tappidare Aramanega 1200 seṭi tapidare ga 120 varaha stanikaru tabadare janavanu
dēvarige vopasuvaru yi dhaṁmake tapidaru
niraṁkuśā narakē paripacyaṁtē dēvadravyāpahāriṇā . svadattā paradattā dharṁmauratti harētaya
śaṣṭirvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi Eṁba srutige Aṁji
tatpalaṁ puṁṇyaṁ rakṣaṇē nāpahāriṇā . Eṁbudaṁ kēḷi . graṁtha .
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōhi pālanaṁ dānātu svargamavāpnōti palaThe ṟecord stops here.
Digital edition of SII 27.195 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
